name: Orange Beef #2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Top round steak, thinly sliced (like Brasciole)
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1 1/2 cups Beef stock
2 tbsp Light soy sauce
1 tsp Sugar
1 1/2 tbsp Cornstarch
1 tsp Red wine vinegar
5 Dried red chile peppers, broken into pieces
8 Thin slices of orange rind (orange part only)
Fresh ground black pepper to taste
Whisk together the sherry, cornstarch, and egg whites until the mixture is foamy. Add the beef and toss to coat the pieces well. Set aside.
Cut meat into 2x2-inch pieces. Heat 4 tbsp peanut oil in a wok. Fry quickly, just until crispy and browned, then remove to a wok rack to drain.
Add remaining 2 tbsp peanut oil to the wok. Add orange rind and red peppers to hot oil in the wok. Stir-fry until the orange rind begins to darken and the aroma from the oil becomes pleasant.
Add remaining ingredients and stir until bubbly (add more beef stock if too thick). Add fried beef and toss to coat with sauce. Serve immediately with steamed white rice.
